description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The exterior is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo and dynamic white wave graphics wrapping around the body. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard ring pull tab, and the bottom is flat, also metallic. The back of the can features nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding details in white text. The surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of aluminum beverage cans, and there are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks. The can is empty, lightweight, and would typically be found as litter in urban environments.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and standard pull tab, showing no visible damage.
description_view_0: The can's side displays a large, partially visible 'Coca' script with the white wave graphic.
description_view_1: The front view shows the full Coca-Cola logo in white script, with the wave design and part of the top pull tab visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding text in white on the red background.
description_view_3: This side shows the bold 'Coke' text in white, with the wave graphic and part of the metallic top.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with a dynamic wave on a red background.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola Trademark CARBONATED WATER HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP CARAMEL COLOR PHOSPHORIC ACID NATURAL FLAVORS CAFFEINE CANNED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY, ATLANTA, GA 30313 BY THE COCA-COLA BOTTLING COMPANY, INC. NEW YORK, NY 11217 12 FL OZ Coke
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
